name: The Rural Angel
original_name: เทพธิดาปลาร้า
overview: Mahatsajan, a perfect guy, is spoiled by his mother. Mahatsajan is very different from his member-of-the house-of-the-representatives father Patihan as Patihan always loves to help people ailing his own health. Mahatsajan has to take his father’s responsibility by living with Phuyai Uak, father of Baimon, a brave and confident girl who wants to promote her traditional fermented fish recipe overseas. Mahatsajan asks Baimon to become a maid at his place for three months and he surprisingly falls in love with a peaceful rural life.

trailers.title: เทพธิดาปลาร้า เร็ว ๆ นี้ | Ch3Thailand
